title: Ollama service unavailable due to npm proxy settings
symptom: When trying to connect n8n to a local Ollama instance, the error 'Service unavailable - try again later' appears. The logs indicate a 404 status code for a missing model.
not_this_if: Ollama instance is correctly configured and models are installed
root_cause: The error occurs because npm's proxy settings are interfering with local requests to the Ollama instance. Even when accessing localhost, npm attempts to route the request through the proxy, leading to connection issues.
fix_steps: Open the .npmrc file in your home directory
Remove or comment out any proxy settings
Restart n8n and try connecting to the Ollama instance again
agent_instruction: Remove the proxy settings from your .npmrc file and restart n8n.
